channel.title: From First Principles Research
channel.description: Research papers featured by From First Principles.

item.title: Adversarial AI reveals mechanisms and treatments for disorders of consciousness
item.description: Nature Neuroscience. An AI system learned to distinguish awake-brain and coma-brain patterns, then identified candidate mechanisms and possible stimulation targets.

item.title: Gene conversion empowers natural selection in a clonal fish species
item.description: Nature. Research summary listed on the FFP research page.

item.title: The path to room-temperature superconductivity: A programmatic approach
item.description: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences. A programmatic approach to prediction and engineering for room-temperature superconductivity.

item.title: Direct detection of an asteroid’s heliocentric deflection: The Didymos system after DART
item.description: Science Advances. Measurements showing the DART impact nudged the Didymos asteroid system around the Sun.

item.title: The dynamics of AMPA receptors underlies the efficacy of ketamine in treatment resistant patients with depression
item.description: Nature Astronomy. FFP summary connects ketamine response with AMPA receptor availability in treatment-resistant depression.

item.title: Bioremediation of lunar regolith simulant through mycorrhizal fungi and plant symbioses enables chickpea to seed
item.description: Scientific Reports. Mycorrhizal fungi and vermicompost helped chickpeas grow and seed in lunar regolith simulant.

item.title: Bulk hexagonal diamond
item.description: Nature. Researchers made and characterized millimeter-scale hexagonal diamond.
